song.title: Strength for the Day
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .Bm G D-A Bm God hath not promised skies always blue, . G D-A F#m Flower-strewn pathways all our lives through; . G Bm-A G God hath not promised sun without rain, . D A G D Joy without sorrow, peace without pain.
[C] .C G D But God hath promised strength for the day, .C G Em A Rest for the labor, light for the way, .F#m G Bm-A G Grace for the trials, help from above, . D A G D Unfailing sympathy, undying love.
[V2] God hath not promised we shall not know Toil and temptation, trouble, and woe; He hath not told us we shall not bear Many a burden, many a care.
[V3] God hath not promised smooth roads and wide; Swift, easy travel, needing no guide; Never a mountain, rocky and steep, Never a river, turbid and deep.
